name: Hot Smoked Portabello Pizza with Goat Cheese and Green Sauc
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Coach Farms goat cheese, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the smoker.
2. Rub the mushrooms with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Hot smoke for 10 minutes.
4. Puree all green sauce ingredients.
5. Spoon the pureed sauce over the smoked mushrooms.
6. Add slices of goat cheese and a little more sauce.
7. Smoke for an additional 5 minutes.
Yield: 4 servings
